entities.description: er methods are conventional methods for entity resolution that are computationally expensive
dirty er is a term used to describe batch processing across multiple data sources for entity resolution
llms are large language models used for high accuracy judgments in entity resolution
a is an example entity used to illustrate the merging of multiple entities in the entity resolution process
b is an example entity used to illustrate the merging of multiple entities in the entity resolution process
c is an example entity used to illustrate the merging of multiple entities in the entity resolution process
12  is a citation reference mentioned in the text regarding entity resolution methods
a b is a specific pairwise comparison example between entities a and b
a c is a specific pairwise comparison example between entities a and c
b c is a specific pairwise comparison example between entities b and c
o n   2   represents the quadratic complexity of the number of pairwise comparisons required

relations.description: er methods are often designed for batch processing across multiple data sources  commonly referred to as dirty er
relying on llms for high accuracy judgments in er methods can lead to prohibitively slow and computationally expensive processes
er methods aim to merge entities like a  b  and c as the same concept
er methods aim to merge entities like a  b  and c as the same concept
er methods aim to merge entities like a  b  and c as the same concept
er methods require finding all possible matching pairs  such as a b  to confirm equivalence
er methods require finding all possible matching pairs  such as a c  to confirm equivalence
er methods require finding all possible matching pairs  such as b c  to confirm equivalence
a and b are compared as a pair   a b   to confirm their equivalence
a and c are compared as a pair   a c   to confirm their equivalence
b and c are compared as a pair   b c   to confirm their equivalence
the text cites reference  12  in the context of ensuring accurate entity resolution
